LightningComponentBundle.description: Lets the user pick a day on a calendar, then select one of that day's records by time slot.

property.name: required
property.label: Required
property.description: If required, user may not navigate to the next screen without selecting a record

propertyType.name: T
propertyType.label: Record Type
propertyType.description: The SObject type for the records

property.name: inputRecords
property.label: Input Records Collection
property.description: Collection of records to choose from

property.name: dateTimeField
property.label: Date Time Field
property.description: Date Time field to use as calendar start date time
